name: frameio
title: Frame.io
description: Navigate and search your Frame.io v4 account
author: phileas

commands.name: browse
commands.title: Browse
commands.subtitle: Frame.io
commands.description: Navigate your Frame.io projects and files

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search
commands.subtitle: Frame.io
commands.description: Search across your entire Frame.io account

commands.name: open-last-folder
commands.title: Open Last Folder
commands.subtitle: Frame.io
commands.description: Open the last browsed folder directly in the browser

commands.name: recent-uploads
commands.title: Recent Uploads
commands.subtitle: Frame.io
commands.description: List the latest files uploaded to your workspace

preferences.name: clientId
preferences.title: Adobe Developer Client ID
preferences.description: Client ID from Adobe Developer Console (OAuth Single Page App)

preferences.name: defaultFolderId
preferences.title: Browse Default Folder ID
preferences.description: Browse opens directly at this folder. Copy a Folder / Project / Workspace ID from the Browse command (⌘K → Copy ID) and paste it here.

preferences.name: signOut
preferences.title: Account
preferences.label: Sign out on next launch
preferences.description: Disconnects from Frame.io. Uncheck after signing out.
